mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO data.import_error_log (tenant_id, task_id, report_id, row_no, column_name, error_type, error_message, cell_value, created_at) VALUES
(#{item.tenantId}, #{item.taskId}, #{item.reportId}, #{item.rowNo}, #{item.columnName}, #{item.errorType}, #{item.errorMessage}, #{item.cellValue}, #{item.createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data.import_error_log WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
